_doc: Golden-master fixture for build_add_slicer_request (DESIGN §X.3/§X.16; analysis #16). Flat public slicer spec in -> exact Google addSlicer batchUpdate request dict out. The slicer points at a data range on 'Data' (sheetId 0) and is anchored on a different tab 'Dash' (sheetId 1); its filterCriteria condition reuses the shared condformat condition builder. The two A1 references (dataRange 'Data!A1:F500', single-cell anchor 'Dash!I1') resolve through the real addressing layer driven by the two-sheet index. No real IDs/creds.
